cta.title: If you want more than a vendor, talk to us.
cta.description: We work best with founders who want a close partner, honest thinking, and people who can move from idea to execution without losing context.

hero.title: We help founders make better

callouts.label: Founded
callouts.description: We started in Auroville, and that still shapes how we work: thoughtful, human, and in it for the long term.

callouts.label: Today
callouts.description: Product, design, engineering, and growth working together instead of in handoffs.

callouts.label: Best fit
callouts.description: Teams that need clarity, speed, and a partner who can stay close as things change.

hero.description: Rooted in Auroville. Built to help ambitious teams moving fast figure out what matters, build with focus, and keep momentum.

proof.title: A few places we've done this.

entries.sector: Health, insurance, and AI advisory tools
entries.summary: Built AI advisor workflows with RAG, cloud deployment, vector search, file handling, and secure chat history.
Built an ESG platform that brings complex data together for reporting, compliance, and benchmarking.
Built a product-to-model image workflow to help generate fashion visuals faster and at scale.

entries.sector: AI-powered market research and data analysis
entries.summary: Supported insight-focused AI and research workflows that help teams turn messy human signals into clearer decision support.
Delivered the mobile app, backend, admin tooling, cloud setup, and AI recommendations for a wellness product.
Worked across website, product UX, branding, and content for a deep-tech drone company.

proof.description: We've worked on AI products, wellness platforms, ecommerce image systems, market-intelligence tools, ESG platforms, and deep-tech websites. Different domains, same job: help teams move from idea to traction with clear thinking and strong execution.

story.title: Rooted in care. Built for clearer bets.
paragraphs: We started in 2020 in Auroville with a human-centered way of working and a bias toward thoughtful decisions. That foundation still shapes how we work today: with care, curiosity, and long-term responsibility.
The roots stayed the same. What changed was the problem. As building got easier, deciding what was actually worth building became harder.
We help founders cut through noise, make clearer bets, and keep strategy, design, engineering, and growth connected.

operatingPrinciples.title: Decide faster
operatingPrinciples.description: Get to the real priority before the roadmap fills up.

operatingPrinciples.title: Build smarter
operatingPrinciples.description: Use AI and strong product judgment to ship without drifting.

operatingPrinciples.title: Learn sooner
operatingPrinciples.description: Stay close to the signal so the next move gets clearer.

values.title: How we work.
Care
values.description: Be thoughtful with people, product decisions, and the work itself.

values.title: Courage
values.description: Say the hard thing early, make the sharper call, and avoid drift.

values.title: Creativity
values.description: Find simpler, better ways through hard product and technical problems.
These are not slogans for us. They are the standards we try to keep with clients and with each other.

workflow.title: One team across the full loop.

stages.label: Strategy
stages.description: Clarify the problem, pressure-test the bet, and decide what matters now.

stages.label: Design
stages.description: Shape the product, the experience, and the story people actually interact with.

stages.label: Engineering
stages.description: Build the product, the systems, and the AI workflows that make it real.

stages.label: Growth
stages.description: Launch, learn, and improve based on what people actually do.

workflow.description: Strategy, design, engineering, and growth stay connected here. Fewer handoffs, faster decisions, and a product that holds together from the first bet to what happens after launch.

teamTeaser.title: Small team. Close collaboration.
points: Strategy, design, engineering, and growth in one room.
A working style shaped by curiosity, responsibility, and care.
teamTeaser.description: We're set up to work closely with founders, not hide behind layers. The people shaping the product are part of the conversation, and that keeps the work faster, clearer, and more grounded.
